title: Bushy Vegetation
description: A collection of bushy grass, bushy leaves, foliage and more to liven up the world. Includes vines, corals, tall flowers, sweet berry bush, nether roots, hanging roots, mangrove roots, pink petals, pale moss, firefly bush, leaf litter, wildflowers.
body:
## Bushy Vegetation Replace those cross-hatched grasses and roots with this bushy resource pack, and the land will look greener than ever before. Grass will be fuller, leaves will be bushier, and vines will be more abundant. From flourishing gardens to lush greeneries, this resource pack will make vegetation look bushy no matter the environment. _Some are even practical!_ ### Includes: - Proper texture-culling for the best performance, and providing even better performance when paired with the [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) mod. - No additional textures were used so that it can be compatible with your favorite resource packs, so try it out and see the changes for yourself! ## Showcase ![A grove of bushy grass, ferns, and tall flowers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Yfm2j4w2/images/81a79f978e1b0bb22acbaca729f385fa4165de27.png) ![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Yfm2j4w2/images/d4690df6e252c208ebcc0dab600d2ce22e0620ae.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Yfm2j4w2/images/d4690df6e252c208ebcc0dab600d2ce22e0620ae.png) Grasses, roots, and the like have had their crosses replaced with a square model that complements their blocky environment. Leaves now extend outwards on all sides, giving an appearance that is large enough to be bushy yet small enough to still see past them.
![View of jungle trees and bushy vines from atop jungle canopy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Yfm2j4w2/images/21ebc5495b8992f66ab14e4fd0457fb3a2620fcc.png) Small leaves have been added to the standard vine, subtly poking out to give a bushy appearance from all angles.
![Showcase of the new models for each growth stage of the sweet berry bush](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Yfm2j4w2/images/f010cc236273aaf07829bd98e9a3b02c3db3724c.png) ![Showcase of bushy Nether-specific vegetation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Yfm2j4w2/images/24619ca61b3e2734892ed12e04bbcb5729b53b76.png) Some changes are also very practical. Sweet berry bushes now have a model that better represents their thorny hitbox while looking cute and stubby, and vines will no longer obstruct your vision when climbing them. There are still many more unique models to be seen. Give it a try, or take a look at the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bushy-vegetation/gallery) tab for more showcases.
